$comment: Phase 4.6.9 — markdownlint config. Initial policy: keep MD013 (line-length) on at 120 cols since that's the original housekeeping target. Pre-existing violations on cosmetic rules (blanks-around-lists/fences, table-column-style, inline-html) are widespread and would require a separate focused cleanup pass; turn those off so dropping `continue-on-error: true` still gives us regression-detection on the rules that matter.

MD013.$comment: line-length: relaxed to 120 cols (vs default 80); long URL rows + table rows + headings + code blocks are exempt.

MD024.$comment: duplicate-headings: CHANGELOG accumulates identical phase headings (e.g. `### Added`); allow when nesting differs.

MD025.$comment: single-h1: tolerate multiple top-level headings in docs that document multiple format versions.
